title: Skinner's Dress Suit
writer: Walter Anthony, Henry Irving Dodge, Rex Taylor
actors: Reginald Denny, Laura La Plante, Ben Hendricks Jr.
plot: Honey Skinner is proud of her successful husband. When he tells her he's asking for a raise, she knows he'll get it. He asks his boss just as their big client announces he's not renewing his contract. He doesn't get the raise, but...
